feedback_items.prompt_summary: 结合个人经历，谈谈人工智能（AI）是否真的能帮助我们解决日常生活、学习和情感中的困难。
feedback_items.transcription:
Sometimes I can't do difficult math problems. AI teaches me how to work out the math problems. I can understand and I learn a lot of things.
AI also makes a witer holiday plan for me. It help me plan well. When I feel sad or worried, AI always makes me happy.
AI is helpful. But we must use it well.
strengths: 文章结构清晰，逻辑连贯，能够结合自身经历从学习和情感两方面具体阐述AI的帮助。
词汇运用较好，如“work out the math problems”和“feel sad or worried”等表达非常自然。
improvements: 注意主谓一致，如“It help me”中，主语为单数第三人称，动词应改为“helps”。
需注意单词拼写，避免将“winter”误写为“witer”。
可以更全面地覆盖提示图中的要点，例如加入关于“运动与健康（sports and health）”的相关内容。

learning_needs.suggested_fix: Review and correct: It help me plan well.

learning_needs.evidence: 注意主谓一致，如“It help me”中，主语为单数第三人称，动词应改为“helps”。
